## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test` — all tests pass
- [ ] `cargo hack check --feature-powerset` — all feature combinations compile
- [ ] `cargo deny check` — licenses and vulnerabilities pass
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if configuration changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-facing change

## Test evidence

Describe how you tested the change, or paste test output.
